name: Chunky Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler over simmering water, allowing it to cool slightly.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8-inch square pan with butter or vegetable oil.
3. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, cream together the butter, sugar, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy, about 2 to 3 minutes. Scrape the bowl twice with a rubber spatula.
4. Add the melted chocolate and mix for about 8 seconds, then scrape the bowl.
5. Add the eggs and mix until blended in on high speed for 3 seconds. Scrape the bowl, then mix on medium speed until the eggs are fully incorporated, about 15 seconds. The batter will not be smooth.
6. Mix in the flour on low speed until it is almost incorporated, scraping the bowl. Add the walnuts and mix until well blended, about 5 seconds.
7. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan. Bake for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let the bars cool completely before cutting. Makes 12-16 bars.
